↑ Click any stage to see exactly what we capture

🏭
Embedded at Production SELECT DESIGN EXCLUSIVE
What brandhub captures
  • Cellular GPS label integrated during manufacturing — before the display ships
  • Label serial number tied to the exact PO line item in brandhub
  • Immediate GPS fix on first movement out of our facility
  • Full chain-of-custody begins the moment it leaves our floor
Why this is unique to Select
  • We manufacture the display — so we embed the tracker at production, not after
  • No installation. No cooperation required from distributor or retailer
  • No other vendor can offer this — you can't retrofit a display in a warehouse
  • Every Proximo display gets a tracker. Zero exceptions.
8mm thin label IP67 waterproof 0 config LTE-M / NB-IoT
🚛
In Transit GPS · DAILY UPDATES
What brandhub captures
  • GPS position updated daily while in motion — manufacturer to IMS to distributor
  • Full route timeline available on demand for any display
  • Estimated arrival date calculated live and surfaced in the dashboard
  • Alert triggered if a display sits in transit for longer than expected
What you see today (without brandhub)
  • Display ships from Bish to IMS — nothing confirmed
  • IMS ships to distributor — no visibility on timing or location
  • Displays sit in warehouses for weeks — nobody knows
  • You find out there's a problem when a sales rep complains months later
🏢
Distribution Hub CONFIRMED RECEIPT
What brandhub captures
  • Arrival at distributor facility confirmed via cell tower geolocation
  • Facility-level accuracy — no on-site infrastructure required at distributor
  • Inventory count synced via direct distributor API connection
  • Quantity received vs. quantity shipped — discrepancy flagged immediately
The distributor network
  • 150+ direct distributor API connections across North America
  • Covers the majority of Proximo's current distribution footprint
  • No action required from distributor reps — API pulls inventory automatically
  • If a display sits at the distributor 30+ days, you get an alert
🚚
Last Mile ACCOUNT-LEVEL CONFIRMATION
What brandhub captures
  • GPS confirms display departed distributor heading to a specific retail account
  • Account-level delivery logged — which store, which territory, which rep
  • Tamper alert triggered if unexpected movement after delivery confirmation
  • Full timeline: when it left, where it went, when it arrived
The exception layer
  • Display delivered to wrong account? Alert fires immediately
  • Display moved after delivery? Tamper alert captures it
  • No delivery logged within 7 days of distributor departure? Escalation flag
  • Every exception visible in the Field Execution dashboard — real time
🏪
Retail Activation VELOCITY SIGNAL · CONFIRMED ACTIVE
What brandhub captures
  • Cases-per-week velocity tracked at account level after delivery confirmation
  • Above-baseline velocity spike = display is active on the floor
  • Automatic flag if no velocity signal within 7 days of confirmed delivery
  • Program performance report: which markets activated, which went dark
The outcome
  • You know which displays are working. By account, by market, by brand.
  • The 20–25% gap becomes visible — and addressable — for the first time
  • Next season's buy is based on what actually activated, not what shipped
  • This is what 94% activation looks like in practice
The Differentiator No Software Vendor Can Match
Without Select Design
Your manufacturer builds it.
Then you lose it.
  • 📦Bish manufactures the display
  • 🚛Ships to IMS warehouse
  • ❓Goes completely dark — no tracking possible
  • 🏢Maybe arrives at distributor
  • 🏪Maybe reaches a retail shelf
  • 📊You never know which 22% disappeared
With Select Design + brandhub
We build it. We track it.
Every single day.
  • 🏭We manufacture the display — GPS label embedded before it leaves our floor
  • 📡Ships tracked daily — position updated automatically, no scanner needed
  • 🏢Distributor receipt confirmed — 150+ API connections, no rep action required
  • 🚚Last-mile delivery confirmed at account level — tamper alerts active
  • 🏪Velocity signal confirms display is working on shelf — or flags it if it isn't
  • ✅You know exactly which 100% of your displays are doing their job
The Hardware
Cellular GPS Tracking Label
An 8mm thin label, embedded at the point of production. No app. No scanner. No Bluetooth. No infrastructure at the retailer. Every display reports its location automatically — in transit, in warehouses, and on the floor.
Live · Shipping with every order
Form factor8mm thin label
ConnectivityLTE-M / NB-IoT cellular
GPS systemGNSS + GLONASS
Water resistanceIP67
Battery lifeUp to 1 year
Motion sensorAccelerometer
ProtocolMQTT over cellular
Configuration requiredZero
Embedded bySelect Design at production
